title: Computer Science 101
description: Fundamentals of computer science and programming.

lessons.title: What is an Algorithm?
lessons.content:
An algorithm is a step-by-step procedure to solve a problem.

Properties of a good algorithm:
- Correctness
- Efficiency (time and space complexity)
- Clarity
- Finiteness

Example: Binary search runs in O(log n) time.

lessons.title: Data Structures Overview
lessons.description: Arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, and trees.
lessons.content:
Common data structures:

- Array: fixed-size, O(1) access by index
- Linked List: dynamic size, O(n) access
- Stack: LIFO — push/pop operations
- Queue: FIFO — enqueue/dequeue
- Tree: hierarchical, used in search (BST) and heaps
